fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: New York Pharmacist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacist? Here's whether your license transfers to New York - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacist license reciprocity new york, how to transfer pharmacist license to new york, pharmacist compact new york, new york pharmacist endorsement application

board.name: New York Board of Pharmacy
board.mailing_address:
New York State Education Department
Office of the Professions
Pharmacy Unit
89 Washington Avenue
Albany, NY 12234-1000

license_types.title: RPh, PharmD
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacist in New York.

steps.title: Submit Application for Licensure and First Registration (Form 1)
steps.description: Register and log in to the New York Business Express (NYBE) portal to complete and submit your application for licensure and first registration (Form 1) online.

steps.title: Submit Certification of Professional Education (Form 2)
steps.description: Have your pharmacy school complete and submit Form 2 (Certification of Professional Education) directly to the New York State Education Department.

steps.title: Submit Certification of Approved Internships (Form 4)
steps.description: Have the Pharmacy Board where your internship was completed submit Form 4 (Certification of Approved Internships) directly to the New York State Education Department. A minimum of 1,500 internship hours is required.

steps.title: Complete Examination Requirements
steps.description: Pass the North American Pharmacist Licensure Examination (NAPLEX) and the Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE). You must be approved by the NYSED to sit for these exams.

steps.title: Await Approval and License Issuance
steps.description: Once all required documents and exam scores are received and reviewed by the New York State Education Department, your license will be issued.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NAPLEX and MPJE.

provisional_text: Some states offer an intern or provisional license for graduates actively accumulating required hours or waiting to take the NAPLEX.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

faqs.question: How much does a New York pharmacist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies by state. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is the MPJE required in all states?
faqs.answer: Almost all states require passing their state-specific Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE) to verify knowledge of local pharmacy laws.

faqs.question: Does New York have reciprocity for pharmacists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacist practice in New York. To work in New York, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacist license to New York?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in New York while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacist in New York
hero.dek: To apply for a Pharmacist license in New York, you must complete the application process through the New York Business Express (NYBE) portal.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become licensed/certified for the first time

variants.label: Reciprocity
variants.description: How to transfer your existing credential from another state

variants.label: Renewal

official_links.registration_steps: To apply, you will need to register and create an account on the New York Business Express (NYBE) website, then search for and select the Pharmacist license application.
